citations.note: Permission is hereby granted ... to use, study, copy, merge, embed, modify, redistribute, and sell modified and unmodified copies
Original or Modified Versions of the Font Software may be bundled, redistributed and/or sold with any software
The font may not be sold by itself, but it may be sold when bundled with other software

permissions.commentary: Fonts may be sold, but only when bundled with other software (clause 1). They cannot be sold as a standalone font file.

citations.note: Permission is hereby granted ... to ... modify ... copies of the Font Software
Permission is hereby granted ... to ... redistribute ... copies of the Font Software
Original or Modified Versions of the Font Software may be bundled, redistributed and/or sold with any software
Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of the Font Software, to use, study, copy
Clause 2: each copy contains the above copyright notice and this license
These can be included either as stand-alone text files, human-readable headers or in the appropriate machine-readable metadata fields
Clause 5: The Font Software, modified or unmodified, in part or in whole, must be distributed entirely under this license, and must not be distributed under any other license
The fonts and derivatives, however, cannot be released under any other type of license
The requirement for fonts to remain under this license does not apply to any document created using the Font Software

conditions.commentary: Clause 5 imposes a copyleft-style requirement on the font itself and its derivatives, but explicitly does not extend to documents created using the font.

citations.note: Clause 2 requires the copyright notice to accompany every copy, which functions as attribution
IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COPYRIGHT HOLDER BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY
THE FONT SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED AS IS, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND
Clause 3: No Modified Version of the Font Software may use the Reserved Font Name(s) unless explicit written permission is granted
Clause 4: The name(s) of the Copyright Holder(s) or the Author(s) of the Font Software shall not be used to promote, endorse or advertise any Modified Version
Disclaimer excludes warranties of NONINFRINGEMENT OF ... TRADEMARK

limitations.commentary: The OFL contains an unusually strong trademark-adjacent protection: Reserved Font Names (clause 3) cannot be used by modified versions, forcing derivative fonts to rename. Clause 4 also forbids use of the copyright holder's or author's name for endorsement.
